hooks.prompt: If this call_site_tool operation published an item with a URL slug, check the slug provided. If the slug contains date patterns (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD, 2024-01-15), generic words (untitled, my-post, post-1, draft, test, new-item), or exceeds 60 characters, return systemMessage with a specific slug improvement suggestion following these rules: lowercase, hyphenated, 3-6 descriptive words, no dates, no stop words. Otherwise no output.
